subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Recognise different ways antonyms are formed

sections.heading: Formation
sections.content:
Antonyms are words with opposite meanings.

The note shows antonyms that are entirely different in form, antonyms formed by adding prefixes, antonyms formed by changing prefixes, and opposite forms such as cheerful/cheerless and sinful/sinless.

sections.heading: Learning Tasks
sections.content: Define antonyms, recognise different ways antonyms are formed, and generate antonyms for given words.
